modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error message when signing into computer on USD network.

full_description_text:  
When signing into the computer for the first time each day, I receive a network security alert. The message states that Windows can't verify the server's identity and suggests that I may be connecting to a different network with the same name. This issue occurs consistently during my initial login attempt.
short_description: Error message when signing into computer on USD network.
